response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) at re:cinq, but the profile falls well short of a Director-level Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. There is no evidence of 15+ years at the required seniority, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms at scale, no cloud-platform strategy work, and no track record advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI future-state direction.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source platform (GISCollective), public talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise at the scale this role requires
Career level is Senior/Staff IC, not Director-level Principal; lacks executive-level technical leadership evidence
No cloud-platform strategy, customer-advisory, or large-org entrepreneurial experience shown

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI/ML expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level Principal IC expectations
Emerging AI-agent / MCP tooling experience at re:cinq
